constraint.reason: Model and API pin required before production

ProductBoundary.InScope: `search_context`, `validate_google_map_link`, `verify_tabelog`, curated ingest/indexing, backfill, lazy canonical POI, deterministic evidence output
ProductBoundary.OutOfScope: Trip planning, internal orchestration, persistent user memory, final answer synthesis, truth scoring engine
ProductBoundary.OrchestrationOwner: External AI agent using MCP tools

IsolationModel.ScopeRule: All reads/writes/jobs/tool responses are scoped by workspace + region pack + source list version

SourcePolicy.PolicyMatrix: Maintain per-source policy for allowed storage, snippet length, attribution, and retention
SourcePolicy.PiiGuardrails: Regex redaction for phone/email/obvious identifiers at ingest

IngestionPolicy.Pipeline: fetch -> normalize -> language_detect -> pii_redact -> dedup -> chunk -> embed -> index

RetrievalPolicy.Architecture: lexical + vector hybrid retrieval, candidate merge/dedup, rerank top-N
RetrievalPolicy.CrossLanguage: RU↔EN query translation/expansion for lexical branch + one multilingual vector pass
RetrievalPolicy.OutputContract: evidence-first response, no truth/final correctness score in v1
RetrievalPolicy.Signals: Expose lexical_match and vector_match signals for auditability

VerificationPolicy.UnknownPoiRule: Missing local POI record must not auto-produce mismatch
VerificationPolicy.UnknownPoiBehavior: Create provisional_place and return inconclusive when data is insufficient

PoiPolicy.Canonicalization: Lazy from observed assertions, not prebuilt full-country directory
PoiPolicy.ResolutionOrder: external_id exact -> geo+name similarity -> provisional fallback

QualityGuardrailsV1.ReleaseGate-1: Weekly smoke set of 30-50 realistic queries must run
QualityGuardrailsV1.ReleaseGate-3: Connector contract tests and replay fixtures must pass
QualityGuardrailsV1.ReleaseGate-4: Validator obvious error rate must be <= 10% on manual audit sample
QualityGuardrailsV1.Note: Full automated eval pipeline is deferred to post-v1
